results.description: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS TASK ORDER 0001 UNDER CONTRACT, W56JSR-17-D-0014 BASED UPON NEGOTIATIONS THAT CONCLUDED ON 7 SEPTEMBER 2017 IS FOR C4ISR SUSTAINMENT SUPPORT SERVICES INCLUDING PROGRAM MANAGEMENT, CONFIGURATION MANAGEMENT, SUPPLY SUPPORT, FACILITIES, MAINTENANCE PLANNING, TRANSPORTATION, MANPOWER, TESTING, AND TECHNOLOGY UPGRADES FOR ARMY WATERCRAFT SYSTEMS, (AWS) VESSELS AND PLATFORMS POSITIONED WORLD-WIDE. THE NEGOTIATION IS ON A COST-PLUS-FIXED-FEE (CPFF) AND FIRM-FIXED PRICE (FFP) BASIS IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $3,227,208.11 AT A FIXED FEE OF 10.0%.

IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS TASK ORDER 0001 UNDER CONTRACT, W56JSR-17-D-0014 BASED UPON NEGOTIATIONS THAT CONCLUDED ON 7 SEPTEMBER 2017 IS FOR C4ISR SUSTAINMENT SUPPORT SERVICES INCLUDING PROGRAM MANAGEMENT, CONFIGURATION MANAGEMENT, SUPPLY SUPPORT, FACILITIES, MAINTENANCE PLANNING, TRANSPORTATION, MANPOWER, TESTING, AND TECHNOLOGY UPGRADES FOR ARMY WATERCRAFT SYSTEMS, (AWS) VESSELS AND PLATFORMS POSITIONED WORLD-WIDE. THE NEGOTIATION IS ON A COST-PLUS-FIXED-FEE (CPFF) AND FIRM-FIXED PRICE (FFP) BASIS IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $3,227,208.11 AT A FIXED FEE OF 10.0%.

THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION 01 TO TASK ORDER 0001 OF THE CONTRACT W56JSR-17-D-0014 IS AS FOLLOWS:  1. TO CORRECT DEFICIENCIES FROM CONTRACT DEFICIENCY REPORT (CDR) #CN21234 FROM DCMA HAMPTON. THE ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGES IAW FAR 43.103 (B) (1) IN THIS MODIFICATION ARE:  A. THE CORRECTIONS FROM CDR CN #21234 CHANGE CLIN'S FOR SERVICES FOR YEARS ONE (1): INSPECT AND ACCEPTANCE: ORIGIN CHANGED TO DESTINATION.  B. IAW DFARS 252.202(A) (I) AND DCMA WORKLOAD AND ACCEPTANCE POLICY. THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CHANGE THE ADMINISTRATION OFFICE: FROM: S5111A DCMA HAMPTON 2000 ENTERPRISE PARKWAY, SUITE 200 HAMPTON, VA 23666 TO: ACC-APG DIVISION E (W56JSR) 6565 SURVEILLANCE LOOP,  ABERDEEN PROVING GROUND (APG), MD  21005-3013. CONTRACT ADMINISTRATION IS HEREBY RETURNED TO THE PROCURING ACTIVITY, IN ACCORDANCE WITH DFARS 242-202(A) (I) AND DCMA HAMPTON WORKLOAD DECLINATION MEMORANDUM, DATED FEBRUARY 19, 2018.
THIS MODIFICATION IS FOR THE EXECUTION OF THE TERMINATION FOR CONVENIENCE ASSOCIATED WITH THE ARMY'S DIRECTIVE TO DOWNSIZE AND DIVEST OF THE ARMY WATERCRAFT SYSTEM (AWS) FLEET AND THE AWS PROGRAM.
